title: Minimalist 10% Vitamin C Serum for Brightening | Improves Hydration | For All Skin Types | For Women & Men | 1 Fl Oz / 30 ml
description: Amazon.com: Minimalist 10% Vitamin C Serum for Brightening | Improves Hydration | For All Skin Types | For Women & Men | 1 Fl Oz / 30 ml : Beauty & Personal Care

feature_bullets.label: [ A POTENT STABLE VITAMIN C FACE SERUM ]
feature_bullets.value: Not all Vitamin C serums are made equal! 86% pure Vitamin C delivers maximum antioxidant benefits by helping brighten dull skin & fading dark spots. This serum is made with a stable Vitamin C derivative, 10% Ethyl Ascorbic Acid that is closest to pure Vitamin C (L-Ascorbic Acid) in molecular size and weight.

feature_bullets.label: [ SKIN BRIGHTENING SERUM ]
feature_bullets.value: This serum ensures high delivery of Vitamin C directly into your skin. Vitamin C reduces melanin production resulting brighter skin. Reduces dullness & tanning and protects from environmental stress such as pollution & sun damage.

feature_bullets.label: [ SOOTHING & HYDRATING ]
feature_bullets.value: Formulated with Centella water that soothes and calms skin making this formula non-irritating and suitable for all skin types. 1% Acetyl Glucosamine added in this serum boosts your hydration and natural exfoliation for a plum radiant skin.

feature_bullets.label: [ CLEAN & TRANSPARENT BEAUTY ]
feature_bullets.value: This serum is (i) Fragrance-free (ii) Silicones-free (iii) Sulfates-free (iv) Parabens-free (v) Essential Oils-free and (vi) Dyes-free. Also, it is non-comedogenic, oil-free, and hypoallergenic. pH 3.9 - 4.9 Formulated with ET-VC, high purity Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, from Corum Inc, Taiwan.

feature_bullets.label: [ FOR ALL SKIN TYPES ]
feature_bullets.value: This serum is suitable for all skin types viz. Oily, Dry, Sensitive, Acne Prone, Combination. Formulated for both men and women. Centella water makes it is suitable for sensitive skin.

feature_bullets.label: [ HOW & WHEN TO USE ]
feature_bullets.value: After cleansing and toning your face, take 2-3 drops of Vitamin C serum on your fingertips with the dropper. Apply it on the face by gently tapping it on the skin. With a circular motion, evenly spread the serum and allow your skin to absorb it. When to use: AM & PM Everyday.

specifications.Product Benefits: Brightening, Even Toning, Glow, Plump, Radiant Skin
